prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent a project evidence claim from shrinking or misbinding the declared, discovered, required, excluded, role-bound, and critical file universe.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current exclusions, critical gaps, and bundle scope

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against artifact universe is shrunk
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: declared, discovered, required, or excluded files are not completely reconciled
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against binding or role is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a required evidence-to-model edge or evidence role has no current proof
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against critical evidence gap is hidden
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a required or critical artifact is missing, stale, or invalidly excluded
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against evidence bundle scope is overreached
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the claimed project scope exceeds the exact bound bundle
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
